professional_summary: Results-driven Python Engineer with 4+ years of experience designing scalable backend systems, enterprise APIs, and AI-enabled applications. Expertise in Django, Flask, REST APIs, and microservices, with hands-on experience integrating ML models and AWS cloud services.

highlights: Provide advanced technical consultation for Meta’s advertising and analytics platforms (Pixel, Conversions API).
Work with REST APIs and backend systems to configure data pipelines.
Troubleshoot complex API integration issues and event tracking workflows.
Collaborate with engineering teams to optimize data flow architectures.

work_experience.role: Full Stack Developer — Python/ Backend Engineer
highlights: Designed enterprise-grade backend systems using Python, Django, and Flask.
Architected microservices-based backend for scalable integrations.
Optimized backend processing, reducing execution time from 3 days to 3–4 hours.
Led a team of 5 developers and oversaw code reviews and mentoring.
Improved database performance across MySQL systems.

projects.title: Sidewalk Deficiency Detection
projects.description: Built a YOLOv5-based computer vision system to identify sidewalk defects; developed Python APIs for model inference.

projects.title: Income Prediction Model
projects.description: Deployed an ML classification model on AWS SageMaker; implemented MLOps workflows using MLflow for tracking.

projects.title: Fake Application Detection System
projects.description: Developed an end-to-end ML web app for detecting fraudulent applications with REST API integration.

projects.title: AR-Based E-Commerce Try-On Platform
projects.description: Developed Django backend services for real-time AR clothing visualization and product recommendations.
